text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Advance Medical Directives 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF END OF LIFE CHOICES OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and information on Death with Dignity (DWD), Voluntarily Stop Eating and Drinking (VSED), advance directives, Portable Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatments (POLST), and patients’ rights. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 922-1132 Visit Website More Details THE COMMONS LAW CENTER LEGAL HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sliding-scale legal services to income-qualified community members. Services are available for family law (divorce, parenting plan modification, custody modification), probate (conservatorship assistance), and estate planning (advance directives, power of attorney, will preparation, trust preparation). PO Box 14280 Portland, OR 97293 Eligibility: Household income 125%-400% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 850-0811 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE COMMONS LAW CENTER LEGAL HELP
